languages.text: {n}Вего-Ан обреченно качает головой.{/n} "Опасность поджидает Детей Искупления на каждом шагу. Бродячие Кошмары охотятся на нас, дабы иссушить тела и души, а треклятые культисты — дабы насытить свои желудки! Жажда, холод и голод живут с нами под одной крышей, однако по сей день мы не оставляли надежды связаться с Империумом. Связаться хоть с кем-то... Посему и отправляли людей на поиски рабочих коммуникаторов и штабов связи".

traits.locale_text: {n}Вего-Ан обреченно качает головой.{/n} "Опасность поджидает Детей Искупления на каждом шагу. Жажда, холод и голод живут с нами под одной крышей, однако по сей день мы не оставляли надежды связаться с Империумом. Связаться хоть с кем-то... Посему и отправляли людей на поиски рабочих коммуникаторов и штабов связи".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: {n}Vego-An shakes his head in dismay.{/n} "Danger besets Children of Redemption on every corner. The wandering Nightmares hunt us to wither our bodies and souls, and the thrice-cursed cultists butcher us to stuff their distended stomachs! Thirst, cold and starvation are our constant companions, but we never gave up hope of reaching out to the Imperium. Of contacting at least someone... Which is why we kept sending people to look for working vox-casters and communication centres."
languages.original_text: {n}Вего-Ан обреченно качает головой.{/n} "Опасность поджидает Детей Искупления на каждом шагу. languages.text: {n}Vego-An schüttelt bestürzt den Kopf.{/n} "Gefahr droht den Kindern der Erlösung an jeder Ecke. Die wandernden Albträume jagen uns, um unsere Körper und Seelen zu verdorren, und die dreifach verfluchten Kultisten schlachten uns ab, um ihre aufgeblähten Mägen zu füllen! Durst, Kälte und Hunger sind unsere ständigen Begleiter, aber wir haben die Hoffnung nie aufgegeben, das Imperium zu erreichen. Wenigstens mit jemandem Kontakt aufzunehmen... Deshalb haben wir immer wieder Leute ausgesandt, um nach funktionierenden Vox-Castern und Kommunikationszentren zu suchen."
languages.original_text: {n}Vego-An shakes his head in dismay.{/n} "Danger besets Children of Redemption on every corner. The wandering Nightmares hunt us to wither our bodies and souls, and the thrice-cursed cultists butcher us to stuff their distended stomachs! Thirst, cold and starvation are our constant companions, but we never gave up hope of reaching out to the Imperium. Of contacting at least someone... Which is why we kept sending people to look for working vox-casters and communication centres."

languages.text: {n}Végo-An secoue la tête, consterné.{/n} "Le danger guette les enfants de la Rédemption à chaque coin de rue. Les Cauchemars errants nous chassent pour flétrir nos corps et nos âmes, et les cultistes trois fois maudits nous massacrent pour remplir leurs estomacs distendus ! La soif, le froid et la famine sont nos compagnons de tous les instants, mais nous n'avons jamais perdu l'espoir de tendre la main à l'Imperium. De contacter au moins quelqu'un... C'est pourquoi nous avons continué à envoyer des gens à la recherche de vox-casters et de centres de communication en état de marche."
languages.original_text: {n}Vego-An shakes his head in dismay.{/n} "Danger besets Children of Redemption on every corner. The wandering Nightmares hunt us to wither our bodies and souls, and the thrice-cursed cultists butcher us to stuff their distended stomachs! Thirst, cold and starvation are our constant companions, but we never gave up hope of reaching out to the Imperium. Of contacting at least someone... Which is why we kept sending people to look for working vox-casters and communication centres."

languages.text: {n}维高安沮丧地摇摇头。{/n}"救赎之子处处面临危险。游荡的梦魇追杀我们，使我们的肉体和灵魂枯萎；受三重诅咒的邪教徒屠杀我们，以填饱他们胀鼓鼓的肚子！干渴、寒冷和饥饿与我们形影不离 但我们从未放弃向帝国求助的希望至少能联系上某个人这就是为什么我们一直派人 去寻找能用的语音播报器和通讯中心" Which is why we kept sending people to look for working vox -casters and communication centres."
languages.original_text: {n}Vego-An shakes his head in dismay.{/n} "Danger besets Children of Redemption on every corner. The wandering Nightmares hunt us to wither our bodies and souls, and the thrice-cursed cultists butcher us to stuff their distended stomachs! Thirst, cold and starvation are our constant companions, but we never gave up hope of reaching out to the Imperium. Of contacting at least someone... Which is why we kept sending people to look for working vox-casters and communication centres."

languages.text: {n}Vego-An sacude la cabeza, consternado.{/n} "El peligro acecha a los Hijos de la Redención en cada esquina. Las Pesadillas errantes nos cazan para marchitar nuestros cuerpos y almas, y los cultistas malditos nos masacran para llenar sus estómagos hinchados. La sed, el frío y el hambre son nuestros compañeros constantes, pero nunca perdimos la esperanza de llegar al Imperio. De contactar al menos con alguien... Por eso seguimos enviando gente a buscar vox-casters y centros de comunicación que funcionen".
languages.original_text: {n}Vego-An shakes his head in dismay.{/n} "Danger besets Children of Redemption on every corner. The wandering Nightmares hunt us to wither our bodies and souls, and the thrice-cursed cultists butcher us to stuff their distended stomachs! Thirst, cold and starvation are our constant companions, but we never gave up hope of reaching out to the Imperium. Of contacting at least someone... Which is why we kept sending people to look for working vox-casters and communication centres."

languages.text: {n}ベゴ＝アンは呆れたように首を横に振った。{/n}"贖罪の子ら "はいたるところで危険にさらされている。彷徨えるナイトメアは私たちの肉体と魂を枯らすために私たちを狩り、三度の呪いを受けたカルト教団は膨れ上がった胃袋に詰め込むために私たちを虐殺する！渇き、寒さ、飢えは常につきまとうが、インペリウムに手を差し伸べる望みは捨てなかった。少なくとも誰かと接触することを...。だから私たちは、使える通信機や通信センターを探すために人を送り続けたのです」。
languages.original_text: {n}Vego-An shakes his head in dismay.{/n} "Danger besets Children of Redemption on every corner. The wandering Nightmares hunt us to wither our bodies and souls, and the thrice-cursed cultists butcher us to stuff their distended stomachs! Thirst, cold and starvation are our constant companions, but we never gave up hope of reaching out to the Imperium. Of contacting at least someone... Which is why we kept sending people to look for working vox-casters and communication centres."

languages.text: {n}Vego-An dehşet içinde başını sallar.{/n} "Tehlike her köşede Kefaretin Çocuklarını kuşatıyor. Gezgin Kâbuslar bedenlerimizi ve ruhlarımızı kurutmak için bizi avlıyor ve üç kez lanetlenmiş tarikatçılar şişmiş midelerini doldurmak için bizi katlediyor! Susuzluk, soğuk ve açlık sürekli yoldaşlarımız ama İmparatorluk'a ulaşma umudumuzu asla yitirmedik. En azından birileriyle temas kurmaktan... Bu yüzden çalışan ses yayın cihazları ve iletişim merkezleri aramak için insanlar göndermeye devam ettik."
languages.original_text: {n}Vego-An shakes his head in dismay.{/n} "Danger besets Children of Redemption on every corner. The wandering Nightmares hunt us to wither our bodies and souls, and the thrice-cursed cultists butcher us to stuff their distended stomachs!
